text: I ordered a set of kitchen knives last month, and they arrived a week late, which was already frustrating because I was hosting a dinner party. To make matters worse, the handles on two of them were loose—they actually fell off while I was washing them. I'm really disappointed because I expected better from your brand, especially since I've read such great reviews about your products. Can I please get a refund for this? I don’t want to deal with sub-par quality.

I've been locked out of my account for days now and it's really frustrating! I tried resetting my password but nothing is working. Can someone please help me get back in? I'm really worried about missing important updates.
I'm really confused about how to reset my password. I thought I did it right, but it still won’t work. Why can't I just get a straightforward link? It’s so frustrating!

I'm somewhat confused regarding the features offered in your subscription plans, particularly whether the premium package includes access to all available services or if there are additional costs involved. Could you please clarify this for me?
Tried logging in, keeps saying my info is wrong but I know it's right. Can't get in!
I received my package today, but it was missing the main item I ordered. It's frustrating because I need it for a project. Can you fix this?

So I bought this shirt and like, it didn’t even fit right. Can I get my money back? I mean I thought it was supposed to be a medium but it feels more like a small? Anyway, how do I start that process?
I ordered a blue shirt, but I got a red one instead. My cat is very disappointed.
I ordered a shirt and it’s not the right size! I’m really upset about it.
I’m really upset about this! I ordered the wrong size and tried to return but it’s just a mess. I just want my money back ASAP.
I am encountering difficulty accessing my account, and I believe there might be a typo in the username I provided. Could you assist me in resolving this issue?
I was charged for a yearly plan but I only wanted the monthly one. Can you help me with this?
I can't believe this! My app just crashes every time I try to log in. It's so frustrating and I can't figure out why. Can someone help?

I was trying to upload my project files, but it keeps showing an error message that doesn't really tell me what's wrong. I mean, it says something about file size, but I thought I was under the limit? It’s been super frustrating and I'm not sure what to do next. Can you help?
I received a faulty charger. It just stopped working after two days! Super frustrating! Why would you send this out? I expected better. Please fix this.

I am quite frustrated with the delays in the delivery of my recent order. I had made plans based on the expected arrival date, and now I find myself in a difficult situation trying to rearrange everything because it still hasn't arrived. I would appreciate a prompt resolution to this matter as it is causing considerable inconvenience for me. Also, could you please verify that my contact details are correct on your end? Thank you.
